name: pii-minimization
description: End-to-end IDPS encryption rollout for data pipeline schemas. Covers Phase 1 (decrypt-on-read) and Phase 2 (encrypt-on-write) across all pipeline frameworks: RDA BPP (PySpark/EMR), QuickETL (HOCON/Hive), SPP (Kafka), Report Requestor (Python), and Quickbase (Aurora+QuickETL). Includes Redshift column widening gate before Phase 2.
